Container.Name: feedBack Demucs Server
Container.Overview:
A standalone GPU-accelerated companion server for feedBack. Offloads PyTorch/Demucs stem-splitting, Whisper lyrics alignment, and pitch extraction tasks to a separate CUDA-capable GPU.
IMPORTANT: On first launch, this container will download several large AI model weights (Roformer, Whisper, Crepe), which requires 9GB+ of disk space and can take several minutes depending on your internet speed. Please be patient.
GPU PASSTHROUGH: To enable GPU acceleration, you must have the Unraid NVIDIA Driver plugin installed and add --gpus all to your Extra Parameters.
Container.Description: A standalone GPU-accelerated companion server for feedBack. Offloads PyTorch/Demucs stem-splitting, Whisper lyrics alignment, and pitch extraction tasks to a separate CUDA-capable GPU. NOTE: Requires 9GB+ of disk space for download of model weights on first start.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: The port for the Demucs Server REST API (defaulted to 8020)

Config.Name: Cache Directory
Config.Description: Location for downloaded model weights (Demucs, Whisper, Crepe) and transient audio caches.

Config.Name: Demucs Model
Config.Description: The default Demucs separation model (e.g., htdemucs_ft, htdemucs, htdemucs_6s).

Config.Name: Device
Config.Description: Optional: The device PyTorch should use (e.g., cuda, cpu). Leave blank to auto-detect Nvidia GPU.

Config.Name: API Key
Config.Description: Optional: API authentication key to secure the Demucs server endpoints.

Config.Name: Cache TTL
Config.Description: Maximum age of transient audio/stems cache folders before deletion (e.g., 1h, 12h, 24h, or NEVER to disable auto-cleanup).

Config.Name: Skip Warmup
Config.Description: Set to true to skip downloading AI model weights on container startup. (Weights will instead download on-demand on the first request).

Config.Name: HuggingFace Cache Location
Config.Description: Redirects HuggingFace models to the persistent cache directory.

Config.Name: PyTorch Cache Location
Config.Description: Redirects PyTorch models to the persistent cache directory.

Config.Name: HuggingFace Hub Cache Location
Config.Description: Redirects HuggingFace hub downloads to the persistent cache directory.

Config.Name: Auto Update
Config.Description: Enables auto-updates of server files at the configured update time (Requires .git mount).

Config.Name: Update Time
Config.Description: Daily time check for updates (HH:MM format).

Config.Name: Update Check Interval
Config.Description: Seconds between daily time check sweeps.

Config.Name: PORT Env
Config.Description: Internal port the Demucs server listens to inside the container.
